channel.title: Teachings on Nicholas Lacourse
channel.description: Recent content in Teachings on Nicholas Lacourse

item.title: Teaching
item.description: 2021 - 2022 I am currently not assisting or leading any modules for either undergraduate or graduate programs.1 2020 BEE2025: Microeconomics II-2 (Undergraduate) 2019 BEE1023: Introduction to Econometrics (Undergraduate) BEE2025: Microeconomics II-1 (Undergraduate) BEE2031: Econometrics (Undergraduate) 2018 BEE1022: Introductions to Statistics (Undergraduate) BEE1024: Mathematics for Economists (Undergraduate) This outcome is driven by COVID and my need to return back to the states for the remainder of my studies.
